title: Scoruluce Small Smooth Sword
description: the short versions of my texture pack, inspired by faithful classic 32x32
body:
# **Scoruluce Small Smooth Swords Resource Pack (Beta)**

Scoruluce Small Smooth Swords (SSSS) is a resource pack designed to enhance the flat swords from the **[Faithful Classic 32x32](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/classic-faithful-32x-programmer-art)** pack by offering smaller, more refined versions perfect for PvP and for players who prefer compact swords. SSSS swords feature a high level of detail with color gradients and intricate designs for each sword.

![Texture of all the small swords ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d23fbe8ea8e9712058ff928fa9f3ee579bc9b039.png)

This pack is currently in beta, and while I've put a lot of effort into making it, there may still be some bugs. I rely on our community to help me improve the pack by reporting any issues and suggesting tweaks via my GitHub page.

**Features:**
- Enhanced, smaller sword textures based on the Faithful Classic 32x32 pack.
- Detailed textures.
- Small swords

# **How to Contribute:**
Found a bug or have an idea for improvement? Please report it on my GitHub page. Your contributions help me make this pack better for everyone!

Thank you for trying out Scoruluce Small Smooth Swords. I hope you enjoy it.
